# JPP's Domain Checker

> This Domain checker is an open source project where you can check if a domain is already in use or available to buy.

## Features
- **Fast Lookup**: Uses Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) for accurate, server-side availability checks.
- **Multiple TLDs**: Search across multiple Top Level Domains simultaneously (Generic and Country Code).
- **Privacy First**: No ads, no tracking of the domains you search.

## Technical Details
- Built with **Nuxt 3** and **Vue 3**.
- UI components powered by **Nuxt UI** and Tailwind CSS.
- Deployed on **Cloudflare Pages**.
- Testing and coverage provided by **Vitest**.

## API Endpoints
- `POST /api/checkDomains`: Accepts `{ domain: string, tlds: string[] }` and returns `{ domains: [{ id, domain, available }] }`.
- `POST /api/getTlds`: Accepts `{ input: string, pageSize: number }` and returns array of supported TLDs.

## Source Code
The repository is open source and can be found at: https://github.com/jpprofessionals/domain-checker
